---
title: "Math, Models & Real-World Problems"
subtitle: "A Tour of My Research"
author: "Eric Friedlander"
institute: "College of Idaho"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [college-of-idaho.scss, logo.scss]
    logo: images/coilogo.png
    slide-number: true
    progress: true
    hash: true
    hash-type: number
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    transition: slide
    navigation-mode: linear
    controls: true
    footer: "Eric Friedlander | USF Math & Data Science Colloquium 2026"
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-color: "#533860"
---

## About Me {#about}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="30%"}
![](images/HeadShot.jpg){width=220px style="border-radius: 50%; border: 4px solid #FFE42A;"}
:::
::: {.column width="70%"}
- Assistant Professor of Mathematics — **College of Idaho**
- PhD, Industrial Engineering & Operations Research — **UC Berkeley**
- Postdoc, Population Genetics — **University of Edinburgh**
- Research: queueing theory, population genetics, chemometrics, psychometrics
:::
::::

## Choose Your Adventure {#toc}

::: {style="font-size: 1.1em; line-height: 2.4em;"}
[🎲 Graduate School: Large Networks](#grad-school)

[🧬 Postdoc: Population Genetics](#pop-genetics)

[🌿 Chemometrics & Metabolomics](#chemometrics)

[📊 Psychometrics](#psychometrics)

[💡 Random Thoughts](#random-thoughts)
:::

{{< include sections/01-grad-school.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/02-pop-genetics.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/03-chemometrics.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/04-psychometrics.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/05-random-thoughts.qmd >}}
